name: Attachments MD Indexer

releases.author: iinkov
releases.description:
This massive update focuses on stability, processing speed, and resolving file name conflicts. The plugin now uses the latest **Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite** model and includes a robust mechanism for handling large attachment volumes within free-tier API limits.

### Key Changes:
*   **🚀 New AI Model**: Switched to `gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview` for high-volume, low-latency indexing.
*   **🛠 Collision Fix**: Files with the same name in different folders no longer conflict. We now use creation timestamps as a unique suffix for index filenames.
*   **🛡 Rate Limit Protection**:
    *   Added **3.5s base delay** between files to stay under the 15 RPM limit.
    *   Implemented **aggressive exponential backoff** (5s, 20s, 90s) for transient traffic jams.
    *   Added a **24-hour RAM-based pause** when daily quotas are exhausted.
*   **🔄 Auto-Recovery**: The plugin now checks every hour to see if the quota has reset and automatically resumes indexing where it left off.
*   **📊 Indexing Summary**: Added a beautiful popup notice upon completion showing exactly how many files were created or updated.
*   **📦 Safe Migration**: Upon upgrading to v2.1.4, your old index folder will be renamed to `(Backup v2.0.4 - safe to delete)`. It will stay there until you choose to remove it manually.
releases.name: v2.1.4 - Reliable Indexing & Collision Fixes

releases.author: iinkov
releases.description:
Updated the Gemini model from the deprecated `gemini-2.0-flash` to `gemini-2.5-flash` to ensure continued functionality.
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/iinkov/obsidian-attachments-md-indexer/compare/2.0.3...2.0.4

releases.author: iinkov
releases.description:
# Attachments MD Indexer v2.0.3

## 🔒 Security Updates
- Fixed security vulnerabilities in dependencies
- Updated @types/node to version 20.11.24
- Updated vitest to version 3.2.1
- Improved overall package security

## 📝 Note
This is a maintenance release focused on security improvements. No new features or breaking changes are included.

releases.author: iinkov
releases.description:
## 🛠️ Bug Fix: Reliable Auto-Indexing on Mobile

- **Fixed:** Automatic conversion/indexing of attachments (including Canvas files) on mobile devices now works reliably on startup.
    - Previously, some files (especially Canvas) were not processed on mobile when "Run on start (Mobile)" was enabled, due to the plugin running before the vault was fully loaded.
    - The plugin now waits for the vault and workspace to be fully ready before starting the conversion process, ensuring all files are detected and processed as expected.
- **Manual conversion was always unaffected.** This update only impacts automatic processing on mobile startup.

**Upgrade recommended for all mobile users!**
